tips_en: I recommend starting with the ProRL paper, as its policy gradient rectifications for sequential path optimization offer a foundational perspective on the RL training dynamics that AXPO later addresses in multimodal agentic reasoning. Both papers diagnose and fix critical policy gradient pathologies—length bias and variance in ProRL versus sparse tool-use signals in AXPO—making them strongly connected reads, while Gamma-World complements them with a generative multi-agent world modeling approach.
tips_zh: 建议优先阅读 ProRL 论文，其针对序列路径优化的策略梯度修正为理解 AXPO 在多模态智能体推理中处理的强化学习训练动态奠定了基础。这两篇论文分别诊断并修复了策略梯度的关键病理问题——ProRL 中的长度偏差与方差、AXPO 中稀疏的工具调用信号——因此是紧密相关的阅读；而 Gamma-World 则从生成式多智能体世界建模的角度提供了补充。
